gist.headline: Daily README Refresh
gist.blurb: Our trusty bot just swept through the README, updating the latest news and recent apps sections to keep everything fresh.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README file to refresh the latest news and community app showcases.
gist.impact: Visitors to the GitHub repository will see the most up-to-date community news and featured applications.
gist.visual_concept: Since this is an automated bot update to a documentation/news board, the Monitor Robot is perfect here. The robot can be updating a literal bulletin board while Polly the Bee assists.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head pinning a fresh piece of paper to a wooden bulletin board. The cute bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny thumbtack. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm and nostalgic.
